role_branch_restrictions_has_target_chk.name: role_branch_restrictions_has_target_chk
role_branch_restrictions_has_target_chk.value: "role_branch_restrictions"."branch_id" IS NOT NULL OR "role_branch_restrictions"."session_id" IS NOT NULL OR "role_branch_restrictions"."class_id" IS NOT NULL OR "role_branch_restrictions"."section_id" IS NOT NULL OR "role_branch_restrictions"."student_id" IS NOT NULL

role_branch_restrictions_entity_target_c.name: role_branch_restrictions_entity_target_consistency_chk
role_branch_restrictions_entity_target_c.value:
(
          "role_branch_restrictions"."entity_type" = 'branch' AND
          "role_branch_restrictions"."branch_id" IS NOT NULL AND
          "role_branch_restrictions"."session_id" IS NULL AND
          "role_branch_restrictions"."class_id" IS NULL AND
          "role_branch_restrictions"."section_id" IS NULL AND
          "role_branch_restrictions"."student_id" IS NULL
        )
        OR (
          "role_branch_restrictions"."entity_type" = 'session' AND
          "role_branch_restrictions"."branch_id" IS NULL AND
          "role_branch_restrictions"."session_id" IS NOT NULL AND
          "role_branch_restrictions"."class_id" IS NULL AND
          "role_branch_restrictions"."section_id" IS NULL AND
          "role_branch_restrictions"."student_id" IS NULL
        )
        OR (
          "role_branch_restrictions"."entity_type" = 'class' AND
          "role_branch_restrictions"."branch_id" IS NULL AND
          "role_branch_restrictions"."session_id" IS NULL AND
          "role_branch_restrictions"."class_id" IS NOT NULL AND
          "role_branch_restrictions"."section_id" IS NULL AND
          "role_branch_restrictions"."student_id" IS NULL
        )
        OR (
          "role_branch_restrictions"."entity_type" = 'section' AND
          "role_branch_restrictions"."branch_id" IS NULL AND
          "role_branch_restrictions"."session_id" IS NULL AND
          "role_branch_restrictions"."class_id" IS NULL AND
          "role_branch_restrictions"."section_id" IS NOT NULL AND
          "role_branch_restrictions"."student_id" IS NULL
        )
        OR (
          "role_branch_restrictions"."entity_type" = 'student' AND
          "role_branch_restrictions"."branch_id" IS NULL AND
          "role_branch_restrictions"."session_id" IS NULL AND
          "role_branch_restrictions"."class_id" IS NULL AND
          "role_branch_restrictions"."section_id" IS NULL AND
          "role_branch_restrictions"."student_id" IS NOT NULL
        )

user_role_assignments_has_scope_chk.name: user_role_assignments_has_scope_chk
user_role_assignments_has_scope_chk.value: "user_role_assignments"."society_id" IS NOT NULL OR "user_role_assignments"."school_id" IS NOT NULL OR "user_role_assignments"."branch_id" IS NOT NULL
